title: Pre-registration document: frozen primary spec + K<=8 config registry + Jun-18 falsification bar (write BEFORE opening the CSV)
source: Split of epic B0162 per methodology survey (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-l2-microstructure-methodology-survey.md)
why: Lookahead discipline: the falsification bar must be committed before any real-data output exists (same pattern as B0161). Survey supplies the bar verbatim: holdout N>=300 trades, PSR(SR*=0)>=0.95, DSR>0 at declared K, >=0 net at 2x costs, positive >=3 of 5 holdout days; lead-lag sleeve N>=50 with own lower bar; else NO-GO -> frozen survival book.
scope: Write docs/superpowers/specs/ pre-registration: exact signal definitions (z-scored vol-bar return entry, OFI/microprice confirmation, VPIN-proxy + realized-vol gates), exits (triple-barrier, OTR TP/SL, 45-min timeout), instruments (XAU/BTC/ETH/EURUSD; GBP/JPY conditional on measured spread; XAG/SOL excluded), K<=8 enumerated configs.
Commit the doc by Jun 14, before the data drop.
recommendation: Deadline Jun 14. The harness (B0164) must read its gate numbers from this doc, not from code constants.
